title: Candace Owens raises doubts over Erika Kirk TPUSA tour future after WHCD shooting and low turnout
summary_full: Candace Owens claims Erika Kirk may cancel her TPUSA tour after the WHCD shooting, but there is no official confirmation yet. Erika appeared emotional after the incident and said she is spending time with family. Meanwhile, reports of low turnout at JD Vance’s event and student protests have added more questions around the future of the tour.
